sn35.55:1.1: … "Venerable sir, how should one know, how should one see, for the fetters to be uprooted?"
sn35.55:1.2: "Bhikkhu, when one knows and sees the eye as nonself, sn.iv.32 the fetters are uprooted. When one knows and sees forms as nonself … all as above … When one knows and sees thus, bhikkhu, the fetters are uprooted."
